reasoning: To address your lactate clearance limitation, we'll focus on over-under intervals. Your last ride suggests a need to increase intensity within your training to improve endurance and power for events like the Alpine Loop. Over-unders will enhance your aerobic base and fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 5 sets of 6 minutes: 2 mins at 242W, 2 mins at 201W, 2 mins at 256W

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
